title: Brand Exhibition Invitation AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 premium brand exhibition invitation poster for LUMIA SCENT at Shanghai Lifestyle Design Expo 2026. Subject: LUMIA SCENT / Lumia Scent Studio appears as the visible brand identity for a home fragrance booth. The hero visual is a realistic 3D exhibition stand with clear brand signage, booth number B2-18, product display, reception desk, lightbox posters, and a clean invitation layout. Scene: Shanghai Exhibition Center and Shanghai Lifestyle Design Expo 2026 define the formal trade-show context while the poster remains a high-end invitation and 3D booth presentation, not a crowded flyer. Composition: Fixed vertical invitation structure: top brand logo/name and English name, upper invitation title, event name and invitation line, middle-to-lower 3D booth rendering as the core visual, bottom information strip for booth number, date, venue, and closing tagline. Signature Elements: Step into a softer ritual of scent. creates the invitation tone and A calm space, designed to be remembered. closes the poster as a short brand-style line; the 3D booth doorhead clearly shows LUMIA SCENT and B2-18. Style: High-end commercial booth rendering combined with formal invitation design: clean whitespace, restrained luxury, realistic buildable exhibition space, polished brand presentation, and premium social-poster finish. Color Palette: Restrained high-end brand palette with one clean main tone, supporting neutral, small accent color, low saturation, and consistent application across title, booth fascia, product display, light strips, labels, and spatial details. Lighting: Soft bright exhibition lighting with realistic LED strips, acrylic glow, glass and metal highlights, gentle floor reflection, and clear readable signage. Camera: 45-degree 3D booth perspective with complete structure, realistic proportions, layered space, reception counter, display wall, product fixtures, and uncluttered poster hierarchy. Materials: Acrylic, metal, glass, lacquered surfaces, wood veneer, soft fabric, product packaging, lightbox posters, plants or industry-related premium props, and reflective floor finish. Typography: Use LUMIA SCENT, Lumia Scent Studio, INVITATION, Shanghai Lifestyle Design Expo 2026, B2-18, July 18-21, 2026, Shanghai Exhibition Center, Step into a softer ritual of scent., and A calm space, designed to be remembered. as the designed visible text hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep a clean high-end invitation layout, readable event information, realistic booth perspective, complete brand signage, uncluttered background, clear product display, and premium commercial rendering quality.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Brand Exhibition Invitation Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 premium brand exhibition invitation poster for NOVA PETCARE at Asia Pet Innovation Fair. Subject: NOVA PETCARE / Nova Petcare Lab appears as the visible brand identity for a premium pet care booth. The hero visual is a realistic 3D exhibition stand with clear brand signage, booth number C4-09, product display, reception desk, lightbox posters, and a clean invitation layout. Scene: Shenzhen World Exhibition Hall and Asia Pet Innovation Fair define the formal trade-show context while the poster remains a high-end invitation and 3D booth presentation, not a crowded flyer. Composition: Fixed vertical invitation structure: top brand logo/name and English name, upper invitation title, event name and invitation line, middle-to-lower 3D booth rendering as the core visual, bottom information strip for booth number, date, venue, and closing tagline. Signature Elements: Meet the future of gentle pet wellness. creates the invitation tone and Smart care for everyday companionship. closes the poster as a short brand-style line; the 3D booth doorhead clearly shows NOVA PETCARE and C4-09. Style: High-end commercial booth rendering combined with formal invitation design: clean whitespace, restrained luxury, realistic buildable exhibition space, polished brand presentation, and premium social-poster finish. Color Palette: Restrained high-end brand palette with one clean main tone, supporting neutral, small accent color, low saturation, and consistent application across title, booth fascia, product display, light strips, labels, and spatial details. Lighting: Soft bright exhibition lighting with realistic LED strips, acrylic glow, glass and metal highlights, gentle floor reflection, and clear readable signage. Materials: Acrylic, metal, glass, lacquered surfaces, wood veneer, soft fabric, product packaging, lightbox posters, plants or industry-related premium props, and reflective floor finish. Typography: Use NOVA PETCARE, Nova Petcare Lab, INVITATION, Asia Pet Innovation Fair, C4-09, August 9-11, 2026, Shenzhen World Exhibition Hall, Meet the future of gentle pet wellness., and Smart care for everyday companionship. as the designed visible text hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep a clean high-end invitation layout, readable event information, realistic booth perspective, complete brand signage, uncluttered background, clear product display, and premium commercial rendering quality.
